title: arum italicum var. canariense
intro: Arum italicum var. canariense, also known as Italian arum, is a variety of flowering plant that belongs to the Arum family and is native to the Canary Islands. Traditionally, the plant has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating respiratory issues, as it contains alkaloids with expectorant and anti-inflammatory effects. The health benefits of Arum italicum var. canariense include reducing coughs and relieving bronchitis symptoms, while also exhibiting antioxidant and antimicrobial properties. Herbal preparations of the plant include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat various health conditions, although it is essential to consult with a healthcare professional before using any herbal remedy.
